Page navigation (proxy)

Source: R/dt2_proxy.R
dt2_proxy_page.Rd

Page navigation (proxy)

Usage

dt2_proxy_page(
  proxy,
  page = c("first", "previous", "next", "last", "number"),
  number = NULL
)

Arguments

proxy

A dt2_proxy() object.

page

Navigation action: "first", "previous", "next", "last", or "number" (go to a specific page).

number

Page number (1-based). Only used when page = "number".

Value

The proxy, invisibly.

On this page

DT2 is part of an ecosystem of R packages for data analysis and computational document processing
developed at the Secretaria Executiva de Monitoramento Estratégico.

Developed by André Leite, Diogo Bezerra and Hugo Medeiros
